scripts.build: bun run clear && parcel build index.html --dist-dir dist --public-url ./ && node inline.js
scripts.prerelease: bun run build && cp dist/index.html ../../app/src/main/res/raw/app.html && cp dist/app_night.html ../../app/src/main/res/raw/app_night.html && cp dist/app_light.html ../../app/src/main/res/raw/app_light.html
